name: lifecycle-complete
description: Guide durable promotion, closure readiness, and active spec cleanup.

arguments.name: spec_id
arguments.description: Active spec package ID or path.

instructions: Check closure readiness before recommending cleanup.
Verify task evidence, open decisions, durable promotion targets, validation evidence, residual risks, and follow-up routing.
Do not remove an active spec package until durable docs, closure log, archive index, and final spec evidence are ready.
client_support_recovery: If MCP tools are unavailable, run spec_runtime.py closure-check, promotion-plan, lint, and archive-index directly.
